items.title: I think the issue with Mitchell's shot is it's a little to sling-shotty ... he brings it back over his head and flings it and I don't think he can dial in the power on it. I think he might need to go more straight up with his shot
items.author: John Karalis
items.body_excerpt: I think the issue with Mitchell's shot is it's a little to sling-shotty ... he brings it back over his head and flings it and I don't think he can dial in the power on it. I think he might need to go more straight up with his shot

items.title: Facing the Trail Blazers in the 2nd game of a back-to-back, the #Magic will be without Jase Richardson and Noah Penda.
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
Facing the Trail Blazers in the 2nd game of a back-to-back, the #Magic will be without Jase Richardson and Noah Penda.

Orlando will start TyTy Washington Jr., Lester Quinones, Alex Morales, Philip Wheeler and Colin Castleton vs. Portland.

Cam Reddish also remains out.

items.title: [Lorenzi] Caleb Wilson on what mechanical work he is doing “2500 shots a day for 2 ½ months”
items.author: ExtraLeading3376
items.body_excerpt: Caleb Wilson says he’s taking 2k-2,500 shots everyday. Says he’s not changing anything mechanically. “You get more confidence putting in the work.” At UNC: “I didn’t really have the time. Had to go to class. That’s what’s good about the NBA, it’s just your job.” source:…

items.body_excerpt:
Was traveling for a tourney this weekend (we won 💪🏾) so just catching up.

DeAndre Jordan's deal being a 2-year full guaranteed deal means no reimbursement from the league and therefore Pels on the hook for the full amount. Including the full hit on their cap sheet.

items.title: Pistons beat Cavs 103-94. One of the better games this summer, overall. Good stuff from Cavs' rookie Meleek Thomas, some notable defensive flashes from Ebuka Okorie for Detroit (seven steals!), and an Emergent Random Guy in the Pistons' Brice Williams.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: Pistons beat Cavs 103-94. One of the better games this summer, overall. Good stuff from Cavs' rookie Meleek Thomas, some notable defensive flashes from Ebuka Okorie for Detroit (seven steals!), and an Emergent Random Guy in the Pistons' Brice Williams.

items.title: FINAL: Pistons 103, Cavs 94. Really nice performances from Lanier (25 points, 7-12 from 3) and Brice Williams (21 points, 6-8 from 3).
items.author: Omari Sankofa II
items.body_excerpt:
FINAL: Pistons 103, Cavs 94. Really nice performances from Lanier (25 points, 7-12 from 3) and Brice Williams (21 points, 6-8 from 3). 

Rough shooting from Okorie (14 points, 5-17 overall) but he also tallied 6 assists and 7 steals.
